title: Family Code § 33.0021
text:
Sec. 33.0021. CONSENT REQUIRED. A physician may not perform an abortion in violation of Section 164.052(a)(19), Occupations Code.

Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 436 (H.B. 3994), Sec. 4, eff. January 1, 2016.
chapter_title: FAMILY CODE CHAPTER 33. NOTICE OF AND CONSENT TO ABORTION
